scripts.docker:d1:create: docker compose --env-file .env.docker run --rm wrangler wrangler d1 create carservice-db
scripts.docker:d1:migrate:remote: docker compose --env-file .env.docker run --rm wrangler wrangler d1 execute DB --remote --file=./migrations/0001_init.sql
scripts.docker:deploy: docker compose --env-file .env.docker run --rm wrangler wrangler deploy
scripts.docker:secret:telegram-token: docker compose --env-file .env.docker run --rm wrangler sh -lc 'printf "%s" "$TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN" | wrangler secret put TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN'
scripts.docker:secret:webhook-secret: docker compose --env-file .env.docker run --rm wrangler sh -lc 'printf "%s" "$TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET" | wrangler secret put TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET'
scripts.docker:secret:openrouter-key: docker compose --env-file .env.docker run --rm wrangler sh -lc 'printf "%s" "$OPENROUTER_API_KEY" | wrangler secret put OPENROUTER_API_KEY'
scripts.docker:secret:setup-secret: docker compose --env-file .env.docker run --rm wrangler sh -lc 'printf "%s" "$SETUP_SECRET" | wrangler secret put SETUP_SECRET'
